title: README.md Complete Rewrite — Marketing-Quality Technical Document
description: Rewrite README.md from scratch as a marketing-quality technical document with Mermaid pipeline diagram, inline research citations, agent framework competitor comparison, and image placeholders.

in: Hero section with image placeholder + factual tagline
Mermaid pipeline diagram with worked example
Pipeline explanation with inline research citations
Roadmap mention for other AI tools
out: Creating landing page or docs site

dod.criterion: README has hero section with image placeholder and factual tagline (no superlatives)
Mermaid pipeline diagram with worked example showing a directive flowing through steps
Research citations inline-linked (Anthropic context engineering, OpenAI harness engineering, Anthropic multi-agent)
Competitor comparison table against agent frameworks (CrewAI, AutoGen, Devin, Manus)
Other AI tools mentioned as roadmap/in-development, not shipped feature
Meet Your Team section with agent table
Game UI shown as visual proof, not headline
250-350 visible lines with collapsible sections for depth
Image placeholders clearly marked for CEO to fill

tasks.title: Research competitor frameworks and verify citation URLs
tasks.scope: Research current state of agent framework competitors (CrewAI, AutoGen, Devin, Manus, LangGraph, Google ADK) for comparison table. Verify all citation URLs are live. Output structured research artifact with competitor data and verified URLs.

dod.criterion: Competitor data collected for at least 5 agent frameworks with pricing, license, architecture type, open-source status, and differentiators vs gruai
All citation URLs verified as live: Anthropic context engineering, Anthropic multi-agent research, OpenAI harness engineering
Research artifact saved as research-output.md in the project directory

tasks.title: Write complete README.md with all sections
tasks.scope: Write README.md from scratch incorporating research artifact. All sections: hero, value prop, Mermaid pipeline diagram with worked example, agent table, competitor comparison, research citations, game UI, multi-platform roadmap, quickstart, collapsible details. 250-350 visible lines. No superlatives.

dod.criterion: README opens with hero GIF placeholder and factual tagline containing no superlatives
Mermaid pipeline diagram renders on GitHub with 5 macro phases and 15 steps, plus worked example showing a directive flowing through key steps
Competitor comparison table includes at least 5 agent frameworks with no coding assistants
At least 3 research citations appear as inline links with plain-language context
Image placeholders clearly marked for hero GIF, dashboard screenshot, game screenshot
CEO-as-CEO narrative present: directives, agents brainstorming/challenging, CEO reviewing
Multi-platform adapters mentioned as roadmap, not shipped features
Game UI appears as visual proof but not headline section
Custom AI agents section explains personality system and lists agents from registry
Visible line count between 250-350 lines (excluding collapsible content)

review.summary: All 10 DOD criteria passed. No critical issues. 9 non-blocking suggestions for polish (tagline refinement, opening tightness, contributing section, SEO title). Well-structured, credible, and factual.
